title: Searsia dracomontana
taxonomy: Searsia dracomontana is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae. It belongs to the genus Searsia, which is a group of plants that are native to southern Africa. Searsia dracomontana is further classified as a member of the tribe Rhusae. The plant's classification is based on its morphology and phylogenetic relationships with other species. Searsia dracomontana is often found growing in dry areas and rocky outcrops in its native range.
